items.scenario: You signed up for a weekend pottery workshop at a community studio. The confirmation lists a 9 a.m. start, but the studio's front desk told you the class actually begins at 1 p.m., and you cannot stay that late.
items.direction: Write an email to the studio coordinator. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the scheduling problem you noticed
Explain why the later time does not work for you
Ask whether an earlier session is available
items.subject: Conflicting start times for Saturday's pottery workshop

items.scenario: You live in a campus apartment where the hot water has been unreliable for a week. It works in the morning but goes cold every evening, and two of your neighbors have reported the same thing to no effect.
items.direction: Write an email to the housing maintenance supervisor. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe how the hot water has been behaving
Explain that other residents have the same trouble
Ask when someone can inspect the unit
items.subject: Hot water going cold in Building C every evening

items.scenario: You are a sophomore interested in a research methods course that is normally reserved for juniors. You have already completed the listed statistics prerequisite with a strong grade, and you would like to join the section that meets this coming term.
items.direction: Write an email to the course instructor. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why you want to take the course now
Describe the preparation you already have
Ask what you would need to do to enroll
items.subject: Joining the research methods course a year early

items.scenario: Your friend offered to drive a group of you to a hiking trip this weekend, but rain is now forecast for both days. You think it would be safer and more fun to push the trip to the following weekend instead.
items.direction: Write an email to your friend. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why the current weekend looks risky
Suggest moving the trip to the next weekend
Ask whether that date works for the others
items.subject: Rethinking the hike because of the rain
